projects.title: Sketch Post
projects.titleZh: Sketch Post · AI 知识图文创作
projects.description: A Claude Code Skill to generate AI knowledge sharing posts using Nano Banana models. Turns complex AI topics into beautiful hand-drawn style comic pages with prompts, layouts, and copywriting — all in one workflow.
projects.descriptionZh: 基于 Claude Code 的 AI 知识图文创作 Skill——使用 Nano Banana 模型，将复杂 AI 话题转化为精美的达芬奇手绘风漫画页面，一站式生成 prompt、排版和文案。

projects.title: MindLift
projects.description: Lifting knowledge and inspiration from Mind to Knowledge Base. Extracts insights from notes, conversations, and ideas, then organizes them into a structured knowledge base.
projects.descriptionZh: 从思维到知识库的提炼器——从笔记、对话和灵感中提取洞察，组织成结构化知识库。

projects.title: Voice Your Video
projects.titleZh: Voice Your Video · 短视频助手
projects.description: A short-video creation assistant that generates voiceovers, subtitle timelines, and translated captions from text. Streamlines the entire workflow from script to publish-ready video assets.
projects.descriptionZh: 短视频创作助手——从文本生成配音、字幕时间线和翻译字幕。从脚本到可发布视频素材的完整工作流。

projects.title: LangCraft
projects.titleZh: LangCraft · 语言学习素材生成器
projects.description: AI-powered language learning material generator from raw text. Transforms any text into vocabulary lists, grammar breakdowns, exercises, and flashcards.
projects.descriptionZh: AI 驱动的语言学习素材生成器——将任意文本转化为词汇表、语法解析、练习题和闪卡。

projects.title: HoopyAI Knowledge Hub
projects.titleZh: 潦草虎皮AI说 · 知识库
projects.description: Visual explainers for AI concepts — each topic has AI-generated comic pages and the exact prompts that created them. This site's knowledge-sharing engine.
projects.descriptionZh: AI 概念的视觉化解读——每个主题都有 AI 生成的漫画页面和完整 Prompt。本站的知识分享引擎。
